currentFocus: Public main is consolidated; docs/state truth now points to a bounded public-candidate/curated-export wording classification slice from main.

currentDocsTruth.publicPrimaryRepo: The public repo is the normal collaboration surface, not a sparse export.
currentDocsTruth.stateReconciliation: goal.md, developer_agent_state.json, and documentation_agent_state.json now reflect consolidated main and point the next baton at a bounded public-candidate/curated-export wording classification slice from main.
currentDocsTruth.claimBoundary: Docs/state refresh only; no product/runtime/test behavior, release/publication, Host/Join, runtime proof, Ghidra, hard-payload, or installed-game/original-BEA mutation change.
currentDocsTruth.localOnlyBoundary: Local campaign logs, active thread/session IDs, raw proof evidence, local proof paths, copied executables, full Ghidra databases, secrets, and runtime caches stay out of tracked docs/state.

validation.currentStateRefresh: Validate with JSON parsing, stale-reference scan, docs/repo hygiene gates, public allowlist, hard-payload safety, and git diff checks.
validation.nextSlice: Use docs/state gates for documentation-only cleanup and add the relevant WinUI/AppCore gates before claiming any code or UI behavior change.

nextSteps: Start from clean consolidated main and re-read current front-door docs, release readiness pointers, goal.md, and state batons.

Classify legacy public-candidate and curated-export wording in README.RELEASE.md, RELEASE_SCOPE_AND_TEST_COMMANDS.md, tools/README.md, roadmap/repo-structure-and-archive-map.md, and release/readiness reference files.
Edit only if the classification proves one clearly stale non-validation wording issue with a safe docs-only correction.
Keep product, runtime, release publication, Host/Join, Ghidra, hard-payload, and installed-game mutation claims bounded to accepted evidence.
